name: diffs
description: OpenClaw-native diff visualization skill. Produce shareable diffs with before/after text or unified patch input. Modes: view (gateway-hosted URL), file (PNG/PDF artifact), both. Canvas integration for rich agent workflows. Trains agents to use the native diffs tool instead of manual edit summaries.
review: Clean, well-crafted OpenClaw-native tool wrapper from the trusted monorepo. Trains agents to use the diffs tool correctly and avoid inferior manual summaries. mode=view (canvas-hosted viewer URL) + mode=file (PNG/PDF) + message tool delivery pattern are well-specified. Short but high-density skill guidance.
